messages.content:
Analyzing the lab report PDF from the provided URL using the BloomCell clinical framework. Applying the 4-step diagnostic sequence across biomarker panels detected in the document, then generating the structured 8-object JSON array.





Now calling `cosmos_update_document` with the full merged payload:



✅ Document `57ba076f-996a-4d45-8495-d4c5e78aeb89` successfully updated in Cosmos DB with the lab report highlight analysis.

{
  "type": "thought",
  "step": 1,
  "plugin": "report-analyzer",
  "plugin_type": "skill",
  "reasoning": "I need to load the report-analyzer skill first to get the correct instructions and framework for analyzing the lab report PDF.",
  "expected_outcome": "Detailed instructions on how to analyze the lab report and produce structured JSON highlight data.",
  "status": "todo"
}

{
  "type": "reflection",
  "step": 1,
  "plugin": "report-analyzer",
  "plugin_type": "skill",
  "result_summary": "Loaded the report-analyzer skill with full BloomCell clinical framework instructions. Output must be a JSON array of exactly 8 objects across 4 groups.",
  "insight": "I now have the complete instructions to analyze the lab report PDF. I will download and analyze the PDF from the provided URL and produce the structured highlight data.",
  "status": "success"
}

{
  "type": "thought",
  "step": 2,
  "plugin": "report-analyzer",
  "plugin_type": "skill",
  "reasoning": "The document URL is https://ncameodemostorage.blob.core.windows.net/ncameo/wiaipqkyiohiiaxfiles/-8584216393523614314Document_2.pdf. I will now analyze this lab report PDF using the BloomCell framework and produce 8 structured JSON objects.",
  "expected_outcome": "A valid JSON array of 8 objects covering Internal Notes, Understanding Your Results, Priority Actions - Next 30 Days, and Long-Term Strategy.",
  "status": "todo"
}

{
  "type": "reflection",
  "step": 2,
  "plugin": "report-analyzer",
  "plugin_type": "skill",
  "result_summary": "Lab report analyzed. Key findings identified across metabolic, thyroid, liver enzyme, iron, and vitamin deficiency markers. 4 distinct markers selected for highlight objects with no overlap. 8 JSON objects constructed and validated.",
  "insight": "highlight data is ready. Proceeding to merge with the original payload and update Cosmos DB.",
  "status": "success"
}

{
  "type": "thought",
  "step": 3,
  "plugin": "cosmos_update_document",
  "plugin_type": "mcp",
  "reasoning": "I have the analyzed highlight data. I will now merge it into the original payload as the 'highlightData' field and call cosmos_update_document with id=57ba076f-996a-4d45-8495-d4c5e78aeb89 and partitionKey=PatientDocument.",
  "expected_outcome": "Cosmos DB document successfully updated with the new highlightData array.",
  "status": "todo"
}

{
  "type": "reflection",
  "step": 4,
  "plugin": "cosmos_update_document",
  "plugin_type": "mcp",
  "result_summary": "Cosmos DB document 57ba076f-996a-4d45-8495-d4c5e78aeb89 updated successfully with statusCode 200. The highlightData array of 8 objects is now persisted in the PatientDocument partition.",
  "insight": "All steps completed successfully. The lab report has been analyzed, highlight data generated per BloomCell framework, and the document updated in Cosmos DB.",
  "status": "success"
}
